basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of PJTAU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PJTAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Agricultural Economics with 60% marks or equivalent GPA with NET qualification
qualification.details: Master's degree in Agricultural Economics, with 60% marks or equivalent GPA with NET qualification and experience of 2 years preferable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the PJTAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University recruitment is Research Associate.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Agricultural Economics with 60% marks or equivalent GPA, along with NET qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the PJTAU Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500030.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit specified for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification.
